notes: External split (mix_index.npy), 8:1:1, 3 epoch, expression-only, val=test leak fixed. train/val/test = 137235/17154/17155 of 171544 pairs.

mix.notes: Mixed (random) split scenario. seed=0 in Response Index.ipynb. Verified val/test gap negligible (-0.0014 Pearson).

legacy_random.notes: Pre-external-index baseline. Random split 9:1, 3 epoch, expression-only. val=test leak present. Kept for reference.
